top_signals.title: Kioxia Becomes Japan’s Most Valuable Firm as AI Mania Goes On
top_signals.summary: Memory chipmaker Kioxia Holdings Corp. replaced Toyota Motor Corp. to become Japan’s largest company by market value, underscoring how the global artificial intelligence boom is reshaping the country’s corporate landscape.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Discours par la Commissaire Hadja Lahbib à la Fédération des Entreprises de Belgique
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Discours Brussels, 12 Jun 2026 Het is een plezier bij u te zijn vanavond, zelfs al is het virtueel. Het spijt mij dat ik fysiek niet aanwezig kan zijn.
Ik was op dringende humanitaire missie ...

top_signals.title: Tchap data breach affects over 73,000 French govt employees
top_signals.summary: The French government revealed that a recent breach of its Tchap encrypted messaging platform affects the accounts of over 73,000 employees in the French public sector. [...]
